Ayurvedic Herbal Face Cream A rich, traditional face cream crafted with time-tested Ayurvedic herbs and oils. Formulated to provide deep nourishment, this cream blends potent botanicals like Sandalwood, Aloe Vera, and natural emollients to promote a balanced, healthy complexion. Skin Care Essentials

Tradlanka kumkumadi Tailam Tradlnka Kumkumadi Thailam is an authentic Ayurvedic facial oil crafted with saffron and a blend of natural herbs. This traditional formula works to improve the appearance of the skin by providing essential nutrients. It is a gentle way to brighten the complexion and maintain a healthy, youthful look.
▶Brightens the Face: Saffron helps to lighten the skin and provides a natural, healthy radiance.
▶Fades Dark Spots: Regular application assists in reducing the appearance of blemishes and pigmentation. Ayurveda
